__fixture__.name: admin_audit_entitlement_refresh_declined_stale_snapshot
__fixture__.scenario: A client refused to treat a stale entitlement snapshot as authoritative for a managed-only feature. The admin-audit packet records an entitlement_lifecycle_transition with decision_reason_class entitlement_refresh_declined_stale_snapshot; every distribution row reports a stale freshness class so the audit row cannot be read as an authoritative-live refresh.
contract_sections: What the seed guarantees / New managed privilege cannot appear from stale snapshots

decision_reason_note: Client refused to grant managed_only_requires_fresh_refresh features from a stale entitlement snapshot; a fresh refresh is required.

tenant_scope.scope_note: Refusal applies to the managed-desktop install across the development tenant.

actor_ref.actor_note: Signed entitlement source; client-side refusal recorded under same-signer continuity.

target_refs.target_note: Snapshot whose stale_past_grace state caused the refusal.

before_after_state.before_state_label: Stale snapshot treated as advisory (no managed privilege granted)
before_after_state.after_state_label: Refresh declined; managed-only-requires-fresh-refresh features remain unavailable_pending_entitlement_refresh
before_after_state.transition_note: No managed privilege appeared from the stale snapshot. The client continues to render managed-only features as unavailable until a fresh refresh lands.

entitlement_snapshot_links.link_note: Snapshot that the refusal was recorded against.

locally_inspectable_fields: Entitlement epoch and snapshot target ref.
Decision reason class naming the refusal.
explainability_envelope.explainability_note: A local admin explains the refusal directly from the packet.
